TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Alapawan, title = Alapawan, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Alapawan} }

S.FORM: alang Alapawan ga niya mki sku Tayto Keng atu Hikasiki go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 517 buwan, 1,430 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 64% kyan ku 915 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 36% kyan ku 515 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Amis 62%, Puyuma 0.5%, binah lihuyan s'uli 0.5%. rhzyal kki'an tay mkraya' na Alapawan hya' ga Asiroay . tay mkyahu' na Alapawan hya' ga Fafokod. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 1 kyokay. hasisyo maki 1 hasisyo. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh

alang Alapawan ga niya mki sku Tayto Keng atu Hikasiki go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 517 buwan, 1,430 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 64% kyan ku 915 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 36% kyan ku 515 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Amis 62%, Puyuma 0.5%, binah lihuyan s'uli 0.5%. rhzyal kki'an tay mkraya' na Alapawan hya' ga Asiroay . tay mkyahu' na Alapawan hya' ga Fafokod. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 1 kyokay. hasisyo maki 1 hasisyo. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ alapawan ɣa nija mki s~ɕku tajto keŋ atu ħikas~ɕiki ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa *** βuwan, *,*** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, amis~ɕ **%, pujuma *.*%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *.*%. rħzjal kkiʔan taj mkrajaʔ na alapawan ħjaʔ ɣa as~ɕiroaj . taj mkjaħuʔ na alapawan ħjaʔ ɣa *a*oko*. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj maki * kjokaj. ħas~ɕis~ɕjo maki * ħas~ɕis~ɕjo. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj maki * pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj. tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
